slides.caption: A majestic snow-capped mountain peak rises above the clouds, its rugged surface catching the golden light of sunrise. The surrounding landscape is painted in soft purples and blues of early dawn.
Turquoise waves crash against weathered rocks along a pristine coastline. Seabirds wheel overhead while palm trees sway in the tropical breeze, creating a perfect scene of island paradise.

Ancient redwood trees tower overhead in a misty forest. Shafts of sunlight pierce through the canopy, illuminating a carpet of ferns and moss below, while the sound of a nearby stream echoes through the woods.
